verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Down the streets I see them building a mansion A lot of time is spent in building worldly fame Until I’ve learned to live in a mansion One that’s built by the King of Kings.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I don’t care for things on earth or treasure For life is too short for me to spend It chasing dreams But up yonder, we’ll live on for ever, in a kingdom ruled by the King of Kings.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In my Father’s house, there are many mansions If it were not so I would have told you so, I’ll be leaving and some day I will join Him in that city where the streets are as pure as gold.
